name: Item-en
ddl: CREATE TABLE "Item-en" (Key INTEGER, "DLCFlags" INTEGER, "Name" TEXT, "NameSingular" TEXT, "NamePlural" TEXT, "Description" TEXT, "Name2" TEXT, "Unknown18" INTEGER, "Unknown19" INTEGER, "Unknown1A" INTEGER, "Unknown1B" INTEGER, "UiStatusEffectId" INTEGER, "Comment" TEXT, "UiItemCategoryId" INTEGER, "SortOrder" INTEGER, "Unknown2C" INTEGER, "IsRandomDamage" INTEGER);
rows: A sturdy, well-balanced knife forged from the feather-light metal known as mythril.

A knife quenched in an insidious poison that robs its victim of sight.
When attacking, has a chance of inflicting Blindness.

Created especially for the purpose of fighting mages, this knife has the power to rob its victims of speech.
When attacking, has a chance of inflicting Silence.
A knife with a blade made of a lustrous white alloy of platinum and mythril.
This knife is useful for both offense and defense.
Light and sharp, this knife is made of an exceedingly hard metal.

Popular among assassins, this dagger has the power to consign its victims to certain death.
When attacking, has a chance of inflicting Doom.
This knife's special waved blade is imbued with the power of the wind, making it even more deadly.

A knife manufactured in a region renowned for its blades.
When attacking, has a chance of inflicting Sleep.
A sword specially tailored to the needs of ninjas.
Designed for ninjas, blades such as this are often used in Ivalice as handheld weapons.
A lightweight blade favored by ninjas for its compact size and ease of concealment.
A sword with a longer blade than that of a normal ninja sword, making it more suitable for use on the battlefield.

A sword with the power to render its victim unable to fight.
When attacking, has a chance of inflicting Disable.
An exquisitely crafted ninja sword that was once used by a secret society.
A powerful ninja sword that was once used by a secret society.
An inexpensive and widely used sword.
A sword with a sharp point, forged for the battlefield.
This sword has a broad and sturdy blade, but is very heavy to wield.
A sword forged from the metal known as mythril. Its brilliant blade is incredibly lightweight.

The blade of this sword is a deep crimson, and is said to drink the blood of its victims.
When attacking, absorbs the target's HP.
The handle of this single-edged sword has been decorated with intricate coral piecework. The blade is imbued with the power of lightning.

A sword constructed using ancient techniques. It has the power to stop an opponent in their tracks.
When attacking, has a chance of inflicting Immobilize.

A wide-bladed sword with a midnight blue handle. It has the power to put the opponent into a deep slumber.
When attacking, has a chance of inflicting Sleep.
A shining sword made of a lustrous white alloy of platinum and mythril.
An extremely hard mineral is incorporated into the blade, making it far more lethal than most swords.

This magickal sword is infused with the power of ice, granting it a mystical shimmer.
When attacking, has a chance of casting Blizzara.

A sword inscribed with ancient runes.
While equipped, raises magick attack power.

This dark blade is mentioned in legends about the end of the world. It has the power to inflict a terrible curse.
When attacking, has a chance of inflicting Toad.
The sword belonging to Cloud, the extraplanar wanderer. It was designed for members of SOLDIER, allowing them to fight to their full potential.
A broad-bladed knight's sword with jewels embedded in its pommel.

A knight's sword given as a symbol of an oath of fealty. It has been blessed with a ward of protection.
While equipped, grants Protect.

It is said that only the true heir to the throne can wield this legendary knight's sword. The worthy will be granted fleetness of foot and divine might.
While equipped, grants Haste.

This knight's sword is mentioned in tales about the end of the world. It provides defense against spellcraft.
While equipped, grants Shell.

This holy knight's sword is said to have been a gift from the gods themselves, and possesses mystical powers.
While equipped, grants Regen. When used to perform a standard attack, has a chance of inflicting Stone.
A katana with a brilliant white blade.
A katana whose blade is adorned with a breathtaking carving of a tiger.
A katana with a blade forged of the finest iron sand by master swordsmith Nagamitsu Osafune, of the eastern land of Bizen.
Referred to as a demon sword, this katana's keen blade showers blood upon the battlefield.
This katana's design was inspired by a legendary blade said to have been plucked from the tail of a dragon that marauded eastern lands.
This exquisitely crafted katana has a beautifully patterned blade and an incredible cutting edge.
This katana is said to have drunk the blood of countless enemies.
A katana with a hilt in the shape of a chrysanthemum.
This katana was forged by a master swordsmith, and its sheath is inlaid with beautiful patterns.
This katana is decorated with intricate designs and boasts a wickedly sharp edge.

An axe with a long handle. Designed for two-handed use, it can easily chop off an enemy's limbs.
The damage dealt varies greatly.

An axe with a large head, making it appear as a weapon used by the creatures to which it owes its name.
The damage dealt varies greatly.

This axe not only has impressive destructive power, but can also slow the actions of its target.
When attacking, has a chance of inflicting Slow.
A rod fashioned from evergreen wood.

A rod imbued with the power of thunder.
When attacking, has a chance of casting Thunder.

A rod imbued with the power of fire.
When attacking, has a chance of casting Fire.

A rod imbued with the power of ice.
When attacking, has a chance of casting Blizzard.

A rod with a crystalline tip imbued with poison.
When attacking, has a chance of inflicting Poison.

A rod that enhances the mystical prowess of its wielder.
While equipped, raises magick attack power.
A rod wielded by a dragon master. Its tip is made from carved dragon bone.

This rod purges doubt from those it touches, turning them into pillars of faith.
While equipped, grants Faith. When used to perform a standard attack, has a chance of granting Faith.
A staff made from sturdy oak.

A staff carried by members of the clergy. It can stop death's slow creep.
When attacking, has a chance of removing Doom.

A staff imbued with the power of the spirits.
When attacking, restores the target's HP.
A staff with a giant serpent's scale embedded in its tip

This cypress staff increases the mystical prowess of its wielder.
While equipped, raises magick attack power.
A stately staff decorated with gold.

A staff that increases the might of its user.
While equipped, raises physical and magick attack power.
An ordinary-looking wooden stick with a curious stone embedded in its tip.

A weapon comprised of a spiked iron ball attached by chain to a wooden handle.
The damage dealt varies greatly.

The head of this mace is loaded with gunpowder, and may spew flames when used to attack.
The damage dealt varies greatly. When attacking, has a chance of casting Fira.

Unlike more traditional designs, the spiked metal ball is attached by a chain rather than fixed directly to the wooden handle.
The damage dealt varies greatly.

The metal ball is covered with large, sharpened spikes.
The damage dealt varies greatly.

A firearm commonly used in the northern nation of Romanda.
<color=151>Range:</color> 8

The barrel of this firearm has been fashioned from mythril.
<color=151>Range:</color> 8

Merely holding this weapon may cause the user to feel heavy as stone.
Has high attacking power, but inflicts Stone upon the wielder at the start of battle.
<color=151>Range:</color> 8

A magickal firearm that shoots freezing bullets.
When attacking, has a chance of increasing the potency of the attack.
<color=151>Range:</color> 8

A magickal firearm that shoots flaming bullets.
When attacking, has a chance of increasing the potency of the attack.
<color=151>Range:</color> 8

A magickal firearm that shoots electrically charged bullets.
When attacking, has a chance of increasing the potency of the attack.
<color=151>Range:</color> 8

A crossbow that can be shot with one hand. Uses shorter bolts than a traditional crossbow.
<color=151>Range:</color> 4

This crossbow shoots specially fashioned bolts that contain a dose of blinding poison.
When attacking, has a chance of inflicting Blindness.
<color=151>Range:</color> 4

This crossbow uses an improved cocking mechanism that increases its attack power.
<color=151>Range:</color> 4

A crossbow specially designed to shoot poisoned bolts.
When attacking, has a chance of inflicting Poison.
<color=151>Range:</color> 4

A crossbow mainly employed for hunting monsters.
<color=151>Range:</color> 4

The most powerful crossbow ever created. Its large size and extreme power generate heavy recoil.
<color=151>Range:</color> 4

A common type of bow that has a long range.
<color=151>Basic range:</color> 5

A bow adorned with silver decorations, and strengthened by additional wooden components and thin plates of animal horn.
<color=151>Basic range:</color> 5

A bow that shoots freezing arrows.
<color=151>Basic range:</color> 5

This bow imbues arrows with the power and speed of lightning.
When attacking, has a chance of casting Thundara.
<color=151>Basic range:</color> 5

A powerful bow capable of releasing arrows imbued with the power of wind.
<color=151>Basic range:</color> 5

A bow strengthened by thin plates of mythril.
<color=151>Basic range:</color> 5

The bow of the goddess of the hunt.
<color=151>Basic range:</color> 5

The bow of a legendary archer. Its great size allows it to generate incredible power.
<color=151>Basic range:</color> 5

The bow of a mythical hero. It is constructed entirely of metal and requires great strength to draw.
<color=151>Basic range:</color> 5

The alluring notes produced by this harp may bewitch and beguile those who hear them.
When attacking, has a chance of inflicting Confusion.
<color=151>Range:</color> 3

A harp with a rich timbre and wide tonal range, but whose notes may drain an opponent's life force.
When attacking, absorbs the target's HP.
<color=151>Range:</color> 3

The pure sound of this harp can charm those who hear it played.
When attacking, has a chance of inflicting Charmed.
<color=151>Range:</color> 3

A thick book describing every known beast.
<color=151>Range:</color> 3

An ancient text bound with slabs of a priceless mineral ore.
<color=151>Range:</color> 3

A book said to contain every word of every known language.
<color=151>Range:</color> 3

A commonly used type of polearm.
<color=151>Range:</color> 2

The tip of this spear is made from the valuable metal called mythril.
<color=151>Range:</color> 2

A polearm tipped with a broad, double-edged blade for inflicting increased damage.
<color=151>Range:</color> 2

A hefty spear fitted with a head shaped like an obelisk.
<color=151>Range:</color> 2

This sacred weapon shines with a pure and brilliant light.
When attacking, has a chance of casting Holy.
<color=151>Range:</color> 2

A spear made from a mysterious material that some say is the whisker of a dragon.
<color=151>Range:</color> 2

A spear of unmatched attacking power.
<color=151>Range:</color> 2

A pole carved from the wood of a cypress.
<color=151>Range:</color> 2

A thin and lithe bamboo pole that bends when swung.
<color=151>Range:</color> 2

A pole crafted from wood that exudes a musky scent.
<color=151>Range:</color> 2

When folded up, this enormous fan with its iron ribs doubles as a fighting pole.
<color=151>Range:</color> 2

One strike from this battle pole can cause the target to lose their faith.
When attacking, has a chance of granting Atheist.
<color=151>Range:</color> 2

A pole made from ivory that has been specially treated for improved durability.
<color=151>Range:</color> 2

A shaft of boxwood carved into an octagonal shape. Has the power to expel one's woes with a single strike.
When attacking, has a chance of removing various status ailments.
<color=151>Range:</color> 2

A pole made from an unidentified material that some say is a whale's whisker.
<color=151>Range:</color> 2

An expensive designer handbag that raises its holder's mystical prowess.
The damage dealt varies greatly. While equipped, raises magick attack power.

A custom-made handbag designed for battle.
The damage dealt varies greatly.

A handbag of simple yet fashionable design.
The damage dealt varies greatly. While equipped, grants Regen.

A handbag that puts a spring in its holder's step, but is produced in very limited quantities.
The damage dealt varies greatly. While equipped, raises speed.

A brilliantly colored cloth with luxuriant weight.
<color=151>Range:</color> 2

This warm and flexible woolen fabric is exquisitely soft to the touch.
<color=151>Range:</color> 2

A special weaving process gives this silk the perfect balance of elegance and durability.
<color=151>Range:</color> 2

Throwing weapon. A weapon originating from the distant east. It spins in the air before hitting its target.
<color=151>Attack Power:</color> 4

Throwing weapon. A pinwheel-shaped throwing star that spins at great speed.
<color=151>Attack Power:</color> 7

Throwing weapon. A cross-shaped throwing star with hooked points for inflicting maximum damage.
<color=151>Attack Power:</color> 10

Throwing weapon. An explosive sphere that showers its target with flame.
<color=151>Attack Power:</color> 8

Throwing weapon. An explosive sphere that drenches its target with water.
<color=151>Attack Power:</color> 8

Throwing weapon. An explosive sphere that electrifies its target with lightning.
<color=151>Attack Power:</color> 8
A shield made from inexpensive materials.
A small shield designed for ease of use when engaging foes at close-quarters.
A shield of beaten bronze. Can easily parry incoming attacks.
A sturdy shield inlaid with a complex ornamental design.
A shield constructed of the featherlight metal known as mythril. Easier to wield than it looks.
A heavy shield adorned with gold ornamentation.
Decorated with azure jewels, this shield provides excellent protection against magicks.
Decorated with crimson jewels, this shield provides excellent protection against magicks.

A shield resembling the breastplate worn by a god. Enhances both the wearer's arcane prowess and resistance.
While equipped, raises magick attack power.
A shield made from an extremely hard mineral that provides excellent protection against magicks.
A shield forged from a lustrous white alloy of platinum and mythril.
A reinforced shield inlaid with crystalline jewels.
An unusually shaped, pitch-black shield forged from iron using the techniques of a distant land.
A shield named after a title used by emperors of eld. Increases the power of certain elemental magicks.
A shield that has been ostentatiously colored using special dyes and pigments. Resistant to certain elemental magicks.
A shield with unrivaled blocking capabilities.
A pliant helm formed from several layers of leather.
A helm that covers the entire head, save an opening for the eyes and mouth.
Sturdy yet lightweight, this helm is made from the valuable metal known as mythril.
A weighty helm adorned with gold ornamentation.
Provides complete protection for head and neck, with an additional faceguard.
A helmet adorned with magickal jewels of extraordinary hardness.
A brilliant helm forged from a lustrous white alloy of platinum and mythril.
Decorated with jewels and extremely lightweight, though the ears are left exposed.
A reinforced helm inlaid with crystalline jewels.
An unusually shaped, vermilion helm forged from iron using the techniques of a distant land.

This warrior's helm offers an excellent field of vision, and may protect the wearer from misfortune.
While equipped, grants immunity to Blindness and Sleep.
A hat crafted from tanned leather.
A sturdy hat adorned with a fluffy white feather.
A hat made from cloth dyed a deep red.

A leather covering that protects the wearer's head and ears. Designed with fighters in mind.
While equipped, raises physical attack power.

A hat adorned with an arcane symbol that boosts the wearer's arcane prowess.
While equipped, raises magick attack power.

A beret for those with little time to waste. Ideal for special missions.
While equipped, raises speed.

Headgear made from a twisted towel that strengthens one's resolve and increases might.
While equipped, raises physical attack power.

A hat employed by the clergy in religious ceremonies. Possesses mystical properties.
While equipped, raises magick attack power.
Headwear made from cloth dyed pitch-black.

A hairpin beautifully decorated with gold inlay. Grants great weight to one's words.
While equipped, grants immunity to Silence.

The crystals decorating this hat increase the wearer's agility and magickal power.
While equipped, raises speed and magick attack power.

A hat that increases agility and stimulates the feet.
While equipped, raises speed and grants immunity to Immobilize and Disable.

A finely crafted hair accessory.
While equipped, grants immunity to various status ailments.

A hairpin adorned with a crimson gem.
While equipped, grants immunity to various status ailments.

A hair accessory made from cloth imbued with mystical energies.
While equipped, grants immunity to most status ailments.
Armor made from layers of tanned leather.
A bronze breastplate affixed to a woven tunic.
Armor fashioned from countless interlocking metal rings.
Armor made from the valuable metal known as mythril. Surprisingly light and sturdy.
Mythril armor with a special design that increases its protective capabilities.
Heavy plate armor that has been adorned with gold decoration.
Armor that has been studded with incredibly hard gemstones.
Brilliantly shining armor made of a lustrous white alloy of platinum and mythril.
Thick mythril armor designed to withstand the heaviest of blows.
Reinforced armor inlaid with crystalline jewels.
Crimson enameled armor made using the techniques of a distant land. Provides complete protection for torso and hips.

Specially crafted armor with the power to reflect magicks cast on its wearer.
While equipped, grants Reflect.
Top-grade armor made using the finest materials and advanced techniques for unmatched strength.
Regular attire that can also be worn in battle.
Leather attire made to be worn in battle.
Thick and sturdy battle armor made from layered leather.
A shirt made of countless interlocking metal rings.
A vest with many small mythril plates sewn into the chest area.
A vest with plates of an incredibly hard metal sewn into it.
A hooded outfit often worn by mages.
A cloth garment with plates of an alloy of platinum and mythril sewn in for reinforcement.

A singlet woven in a distant land that is favored by martial arts practitioners. Protects against sudden death.
While equipped, raises physical attack power and grants immunity to instant KO.

Strength surges in those who don this garment. Drawstrings can be used to tuck the sleeves away.
While equipped, raises physical attack power.
Clothing woven from a brightly patterned material imbued with the power of the earth.

Lightweight clothing that allows the wearer to blend into their surroundings. Ideal for covert missions.
While equipped, raises speed and grants Invisibility at the start of battle.

Pitch-black clothing that is immune to changes in the passage of time.
While equipped, grants immunity to Stop.
Electrically insulated clothing made from a special resin that molds to the contours of the wearer's body.
A simple robe made from a single length of linen cloth.
A robe made from layers of fine silk cloth.

A hooded robe that completely covers the wearer's body.
While equipped, raises magick attack power.

A robe dyed with pigments extracted from shining green stones, and blessed with a sacred power.
While equipped, grants immunity to instant KO.
Pure white vestments that provide some protection against elemental magicks.
Pitch-black vestments that increase the strength of some elemental magicks.
The material in this robe has been woven from threads that glow faintly with magick.

A luxurious robe worn by high-ranking nobles. Enchanted with protective magick.
While equipped, raises physical and magick attack power, and grants Protect and Shell.

Battle-ready boots made from layers of leather for ease of movement.
While equipped, raises the movement attribute.

The spiked soles of these boots improve one's footing.
While equipped, raises the jump attribute.

Boots with a snug fit that greatly increases the wearer's mobility.
While equipped, raises the movement and jump attributes.

Electrically resistant boots that have been treated with a special resin.
While equipped, grants immunity to Immobilize.

Boots that give the sensation of walking on air.
While equipped, grants Float.

Lightweight footwear made by a famous cobbler.
While equipped, raises speed.

Comfortable shoes fashioned from crimson leather with magickal properties.
While equipped, raises magick attack power and movement.

Leather gauntlets that allow for a firm grip.
While equipped, raise physical attack power.

Vermilion gloves that boost physical and magickal prowess, made using techniques from a distant land.
While equipped, raise physical and magick attack power.

Sturdy gloves imbued with magickal power.
While equipped, raise magick attack power.

Gloves of thin leather that enhance the wearer's strength.
While equipped, raise physical attack power.

A ring engraved with arcane symbols that reflects magicks cast upon the wearer.
While equipped, grants Reflect.

A ring forged from metal imbued with magick that prevents the wearer falling into a deep slumber.
While equipped, grants immunity to Sleep and Doom.

A protective ring inlaid with a magickal gemstone.
While equipped, grants immunity to Silence and Berserk.

A ring inhabited by evil spirits that imparts great power, but transforms the wearer into the living dead.
While equipped, raises speed, physical and magick attack power, but inflicts Undead status.

A ring that grants the wearer enhanced vision and divine protection.
While equipped, grants immunity to instant KO and Blindness, and also grants Reraise at the start of battle.

A bracelet embedded with shining jewels to enhance physicality.
While equipped, raises physical and magick attack power, and grants immunity to Slow.

A bracelet cut from precious stone and carefully polished. Helps maintain the wearer's sense of time.
While equipped, grants immunity to Stone and Stop.

A string of 108 prayer beads made from the seeds of a sacred tree. Protects against a range of maladies and enhances the wearer's magicks.
While equipped, grants immunity to various status ailments.

An armband worn during a ceremony to venerate gods of darkness. Protects against dark magicks.
While equipped, grants immunity to Confusion and Charmed.

A bracelet inlaid with crimson jewels that maintains the wearer's mobility.
While equipped, grants immunity to Immobilize and Disable.

A hooded cloak often worn by mages to elevate their magicks.
While equipped, raises magick attack power.
A short cloak made of an especially thin fabric.
A stylish cloak with an inner lining of a different color fabric than the exterior.
A cloak that is as light and soft as featherdown.

This cloak allows the wearer to blend in perfectly with their surroundings.
While equipped, grants Invisibility at the start of battle.

The soothing scent of this perfume gives a sensation of endless vitality.
While equipped, grants Regen and Reraise.

The refreshing fragrance of this perfume makes one feel light as air, and able to repel even the mightiest of magicks.
While equipped, grants Float and Reflect.

A perfume with an otherworldly aroma that grants a sense of unbound celerity.
While equipped, raises magick attack power and grants Haste. Also grants Invisibility at the start of battle.

A perfume with a rich redolence that gives a sensation of being enveloped by potent blessings.
While equipped, grants Protect and Shell.

This materia blade has undergone augmentation to further enhance the prowess of SOLDIER members.

This highly practical sword is awarded to Akademy students who score well in their tests.
